Package com.here.sdk.mapview.datasource

Interface PointTileSource

All Superinterfaces:
TileSource
public interface PointTileSource extends TileSource

A source of geodetic point tiles. The implementations must be thread-safe.

Note: This is a beta release of this feature, so there could be a few bugs and unexpected behavior. Related APIs may change for new releases without a deprecation process.

  • Method Details

    • loadTile

      @Nullable TileSource.LoadTileRequestHandle loadTile(@NonNull TileKey tileKey, @NonNull PointTileSource.LoadResultHandler completionHandler)

      Load data of a tile. Upon completion, the handler gets informed.

      Parameters:
      tileKey -

      Key of the tile to load data for.

      completionHandler -

      Load result handler.

      Returns:

      A handle to the created load request.
